summary.intent: Migrate the gossamer app from React Native/Expo to Electron with file-based routing, add a CheckpointTimeline screen, and fix live updates by wiring the WebSocket broadcaster to the V2 checkpoint tables.
summary.outcome: App was fully migrated to Electron+Vite+React Router DOM; all screens ported with a primitives shim; CheckpointTimeline added; server WebSocket poller updated to watch CheckpointMetadata; sessions view refactored to use CheckpointSessionMetadata for branch and intent fields.

repo: expo-router defaults to an `app/` directory for routes, which collides with the existing `app/` project root — must set `['expo-router', { 'root': 'routes' }]` in app.json to rename
electron-vite outputs to `out/main/`, `out/preload/`, `out/renderer/` by default — package.json main must be `out/main/index.js`, not `dist-electron/main.js`
The Session model has no `branch` field — branch is only stored on CheckpointSessionMetadata, joined via sessionId
CheckpointSessionSummary holds the AI-generated intent field; it's a relation on CheckpointSessionMetadata
The server's 2s WebSocket broadcast poller only watched the Event table — CheckpointMetadata inserts were silent and never triggered UI updates
The gossamer git worktree at /tmp/gossamer-checkpoints is ephemeral and gets wiped between macOS restarts; server needs to prune stale worktree refs on startup
runIndex() was only called on a 30s interval, not on startup — first checkpoint data appeared with a 30s delay after server start

code.finding: WebSocket broadcast poller that only watched Event table — needed to also track max CheckpointMetadata.id to trigger updates on new checkpoints
RN→Web shim: View→div with display:flex/flex-direction:column, Text→div, TouchableOpacity→div[role=button], StyleSheet.create is a passthrough, flatStyle merges array styles
MemoryRouter is appropriate for Electron (no browser URL bar); all 6 routes nested under Layout with Outlet
Title computed from useLocation().pathname + state.title passed via navigate(path, { state: { title } }) — replaces Stack.Screen options per screen

workflow: Background task exit code 144 in this project always means the process was killed by pkill during a subsequent restart — not a real failure
electron-vite dev mode sets ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL env var which the main process uses to loadURL instead of loadFile
When migrating RN→Web, MarkdownView must be fully rewritten to semantic HTML because nested Text→div creates block-inside-inline violations
Building with electron-vite before running catches TypeScript errors early across all three entry points (main/preload/renderer)

friction: expo-router naming collision with the existing app/ project directory required non-obvious plugin config to fix
electron-vite default output path (`out/`) didn't match the assumed `dist-electron/` path, causing Electron to fail to launch on first attempt
Expo toolchain auto-modified tsconfig.json and stripped the `include` array that was manually added
Multiple stale background task failure notifications required reading output files to confirm they were harmless pkill signals
WebSocket live updates were silently broken post-migration because the poller only watched one table — required reading server source to diagnose
open_items: Branch field could be added directly to the Session model and populated from SessionStart hook events, rather than always joining CheckpointSessionMetadata
Worktree pruning fix was added to server.ts but requires a rebuild+restart to take effect — should be verified on next cold start
Mantine component library was mentioned as a motivation for moving to Electron but no Mantine components were actually installed or used yet
CheckpointSessionSummary intent falls back to session.summary then prompt — the fallback chain should be reviewed for correctness
The checkpoint git poller's 30s interval is still relatively slow for live updates; the 2s Event table poller now covers CheckpointMetadata but the indexer itself still runs every 30s
